§P-D6: Bid row for bidder_name='bidder_07' in phase=1 has no NDA row under the same bidder_name in that phase. If this is an atomized buyer-group constituent, the extractor must emit the constituent's NDA row, including inherited group-NDA status when applicable (§I3). If this bidder's NDA was emitted as an unnamed §E3 placeholder, the extractor should have attached `unnamed_nda_promotion` on this Bid row to promote the placeholder at pipeline-finalize time. If this is a §D1 unsolicited first-contact where the bidder never signs an NDA, attach the `unsolicited_first_contact` flag (§D1.a) to exempt this row.
